arts.ttl: Peterborough United boss makes Wigan Athletic admission after 'embarrassing' blow
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic's next opponents Peterborough United will have to lick their wounds ahead of the game after being torn into by their manager Darren Ferguson.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic chief on 'not particularly tough' decision to give James Carragher his chance
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney admitted James Carragher's performance at the heart of the Wigan Athletic defence against Bristol Rovers has given him a huge selection headache.

arts.ttl: Preview: Peterborough United vs. Wigan Athletic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League One clash between Peterborough United and Wigan Athletic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
